prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Audit the privilege and RBAC enforcement in pingcap/tidb. Find all Go source files under pkg/privilege/ and pkg/planner/ that implement privilege checking for SQL statements. Identify: the PrivilegeManager interface, the MySQLPrivilege cache, the RequestVerification method and its callers, the role graph resolution logic, and any files that map SQL statement types to required privileges. For each file report the path and its role in the privilege check flow.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the tidb-database fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Audit the privilege and RBAC enforcement in pingcap/tidb. Find all Go source files under pkg/privilege/ and pkg/planner/ that implement privilege checking for SQL statements. Identify: the PrivilegeManager interface, the MySQLPrivilege cache, the RequestVerification method and its callers, the role graph resolution logic, and any files that map SQL statement types to required privileges. For each file report the path and its role in the privilege check flow.
